description: Known CDPATH-sensitive script_dir pattern still exists in quickshell verification scripts.
Quickshell compositor guard or fixture checks failed after bootstrap verification.
quickshell.service is not active in the user session.
quickshell.service is active but no reachable IPC socket was found.
The health loop could not open and close SettingsHub via quickshell IPC.
repro: quickshell ipc --id <instance> call SettingsHub openTabScrolled wallpaper 0

description: The health loop could not open and close the control center via quickshell IPC.
repro: quickshell ipc --id <instance> call Shell openSurface controlCenter

description: The health loop could not open and close the notification center via quickshell IPC.
repro: quickshell ipc --id <instance> call Shell openSurface notifCenter

description: Repeated render-layer texture allocation warnings were found in the quickshell journal.
repro: journalctl --user -u quickshell --since '15 minutes ago' --no-pager | rg 'QSGRhiLayer: Unsupported size requested'

description: A QML/runtime error was found in the quickshell journal.
repro: journalctl --user -u quickshell --since '15 minutes ago' --no-pager | rg 'ReferenceError|TypeError|Error loading|Failed to load|Cannot assign|QML .* Error'
